programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make chalk. Mayor Maggie reports that all of the vacuum sweepers in Westwood are missing. King Friday assigns Lady Aberlin, Mayor Maggie and Prince Tuesday to find the missing vacuums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets with some children who are making crafts at the Inner City Art Center in Los Angeles. In Make-Believe, Lady Elaine's friends help her conquer her fears.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely look at snow globes and see a film about how people make cereal. King Friday says he is the bravest and strongest in the neighborhood. Cereal is falling like snow. Mister Rogers goes to a Tae Kwon Do class.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers returns a scarf to one of Mr. Brewer's puppets which makes the puppet feel brave and strong. Elsie Jean Platypus tells Lady Abelrin that the cereal quit falling on her because she was not afraid of it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A career criminal wins big at a poker tournament while on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A wanted murderer carries on a spree of fraud, robbery and other crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man's life includes many trips to prison, and nearly as many escapes.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Life in the town of Duchesne, about 100 miles from Salt Lake City, is as hard as sun-baked rock and weather-beaten leather. Everyone must struggle to survive, except John Pinder, the ne'er-do-well son of a millionaire.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: A conservative town with strong law-and-order values is shaken up when its tough county judge is charged with killing his political rival's law partner.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: The folks of Lexington, Kentucky love two things: horses and University of Kentucky sports. But in 1994, it wasn't March Madness or the Triple Crown that had this college town on the edge of its seat.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Somerset, Kentucky may be suburban on the surface, but when a modern-day bootlegger turns a political shindig into a shooting gallery, there's no doubt that this Kentucky town is still hillbilly at heart.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped… a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: An ex-con flees after she runs over a man she thinks has stolen her money.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Paul decides to take one of his prized 1959s and go full lowrider with hydraulics and a full custom lowrider paint job; Shorty's wife Lupe has a 1992 Mustang GT 5.0, and Shorty has a honey do list to get this car back to its original glory.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: Discovering how a wet system stacks up against a dry system in an EFI manifold.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: Multipoint EFI gets its turn against the venerable Dominator; it's injectors versus jets, dry flow versus wet, and drivability versus horsepower.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: Derek teams up with Dave Chappelle to revitalize a 1972 Jeep J2000 that's sat among a field of neglected Jeeps; together, they cobble together parts from various Jeeps to get theirs running and attempt to make the 100-mile journey to Derek's shop.

programme.title: Faster With Newbern and Cotten
programme.desc: For years, Pigpen, the junkyard rescued 1950 GMC truck, has sat dormant; the guys awaken a monster by donating the chassis of their own legendary 1985 S-15 in a body swap for the ages, then take on Randy Pobst at Atlanta Motor Speedway.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: The ability to run a blend of gas and E85 is a game changer; credit the flex fuel sensor, which samples fuel composition and adjusts fuel flow, making more power as more E85 is mixed in.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: Do boost leaks really even matter? Can vacuum leaks make more power? You read those questions right. Come be surprised right along with us as we find power in unexpected places, and lose less than we'd expect in others.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: In the snowy landscape of Michigan's Northern Peninsula, Derek finds a 1964 Ford Galaxie that's sat abandoned for 32 years; he plans to not only get this Ford running, but also to turn it into a rally-tribute car.

programme.title: Faster With Newbern and Cotten
programme.desc: The guys try their hand at no-prep drag racing against Lyle Barnett and his turbocharged 1,500-hp Beer Money Mustang.

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: With new demands from their client, Classic Car Studios fights to finish their 1971 Chevelle reinvention from classic muscle to modern day super car.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: Dan and Shea drive out to Clovis, New Mexico, to buy the holy grail of JDM imports, a Toyota AE86; nostalgia aside, Aaron is skeptical whether it was a good buy, or even roadworthy.

programme.title: Head 2 Head
programme.desc: Iconic cars go against one another in a battle for bragging rights.

programme.title: Head 2 Head Drag Race
programme.desc: Jeff and Jonny can't decide which supertruck is best, or even what the definition of supertruck is; they debate whether it's about how it looks, sounds or drives, horsepower/torque, whether it can be electric, and whether it can even do truck things.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: Some cars carry powerful myths with them long after they are gone; these are stories of cars whose intriguing legends have endured long past the metal they are made from.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: The quest for speed has been ingrained in humans since the birth of the wheel; these are stories of people who gathered like-minded speed freaks and created outlaw cultures of pushing the limits of public roads.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: All American Classics, a popular salvage yard in Vancouver, Wash., has been forced to downsize due to city expansion and rising taxes; that doesn't stop Steve Magnante from finding what he's looking for in this classic auto salvage yard.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold

programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: estación de bomberos 32, la computadora, la vecina, la billetera, el bosque.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: El 16 de abril de 2008, la ciudad de Kokomo, Indiana, fue sacudida por una gran explosión que perforó muchos oídos. Las casas se agitaron, miles de ciudadanos llamaron al 911 y la policía, los bomberos y Seguridad Nacional se presentaron para investigar.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: A principios de los años 50, James McDonald, un físico experimentado de la Universidad de Arizona, cambió el curso de la investigación sobre ovnis. Durante casi 20 años, examinó los informes sobre ovnis con gran detalle.

programme.title: Archivos de ovni
programme.desc: La pesadilla de un ranchero. La misteriosa muerte de ganado ha plagado a las tierras del mundo durante generaciones. Comúnmente conocidas como mutilaciones de ganado, estas extrañas muertes les ocurren a caballos, cabras, ovejas y conejos.

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Ryan se prepara para luchar contra el demonio burlón que lo ha estado siguiendo. Reúne a sus mejores investigadores: un sacerdote, un psíquico y una pareja de demonólogos mientras se enfrenta a su caso más desgarrador hasta ahora.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Daring Danny X is stuck in a tree over a deep canyon and pursued by hungry bears; Mayor Humdinger sabotages Mayor Goodway's perfect petals for the tulip contest.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: All the fruit at the annual Jamboree Jamfest is carried off by ants; Zuma goes on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Rocky helps repair the tires on the Adventure Bay school bus; Ryder and Chase search for missing songbirds.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Yumi's crops begin to sprout huge vegetables, the PAW Patrol must corral the stampeding produce; the pups draw a message for space aliens on Farmer Al's field.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The pups plan to race each other on Adventure Bay Race Day; Mr. Porter enters a cake competition.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jake's mountain; the pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When the pups and Cap'n Turbot camp out under a magical moon, they are transformed into mer-pups so they can perform an underwater rescue.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change things up; Lori develops the yips when she finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favorites; when Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a million soccer goal, Lynn tries to be supportive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-book way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over; Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods and discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan tries out for the school play to get closer to her crush, Benny; when Clyde and schoolmate Zach begin bonding over a mutual interest in antiques, Lincoln quickly finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions, but their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne makes friends with Sid, a girl whose family wants to rent the apartment upstairs; when it looks like another couple might get it first, the girls resort to sabotage to try and dissuade them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage; desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero; Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help; Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a fancy grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete; Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lucha Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Louds rent a boat for a relaxing day trip on the lake, but the family ends up marooned on a desert island; Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, investigate when they discover a frozen food company is using Dad's recipes.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift; Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori takes a job as a waitress at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated; spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection; Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school; Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Stella's music box disappears at school, the gang immediately suspects a student urban legend known as the Rat Beast; after a night of zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln find an empty Loud house and assume it's a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Worried that his teacher has bad things to say about him, Lincoln tries to delay his parent-teacher conference; Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Eager to be named Kings of the Con at the Ace Savvy convention, Lincoln and Clyde convince the sisters to go with them as the Full Deck; when the girls get more attention, the boys do whatever it takes to gain focus.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports-watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse; when Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To divert the attention of his helicopter dads, Clyde arranges for an exchange student to stay with them; Lola takes a timid new classmate under her wing and gives her a social butterfly transformation.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luna discovers that the high school music club will be axed due to budget cuts, she leads a protest; desperate to play Lincoln's trash-themed video game, Lana conspires to distract her brother away from the console.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Mom tries to convince a newspaper editor that her kids are perfect in order to land a parenting advice column job; Luna is hired to watch the McBrides' cat when they go out of town, but the job becomes more demanding than she imagined.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Feeling like a third wheel when her teammates find significant others, Lynn seeks a boyfriend just to fit in; Clyde recruits Lincoln and the gang to find out if a girl he has a crush on at school feels the same about him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other; after causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him without Mom and Dad knowing.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans; Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn's extreme sports superstitions cause chaos; the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with their childhood toys.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, so she teams up with Lily; Lori vows to make up for lost time in her senior year.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby; Luan must enroll in a culinary class.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The siblings turn to Lisa's intelligence to help them land a spot on "Double Dare"; after secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about the exploits their sister writes about.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering; to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local ride-share driver.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Leni, the oldest in the house, struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter; secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Louds' suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola does everything to stop Lana from planning their joint birthday party; Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve a mystery.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa searches for the next big scientific breakthrough; Luna decides whether to play in a band with her friends or play with professionals.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln debe apurar a sus hermanas para no llegar tarde a la escuela; Lincoln consigue la aprobación decisiva para las vacaciones familiares.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln hace todo lo posible por no oír a sus hermanas; Lynn se pelea con Lucy y Lincoln deja que Lynn pase la noche en su cuarto.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere capturar la fotografía perfecta de su familia como obsequio para sus padres por motivo de su aniversario de bodas; Lincoln hace una apuesta con sus hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La nueva piscina de Lincoln resulta demasiado pequeña y él y sus diez hermanas no pueden usarla al mismo tiempo; Lincoln trata de manipular a Lily para que crezca desarrollando la mentalidad que a él le agrada, no como sus otras hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln invita a Clyde a una fiesta de pijamas, pero se pone celoso cuando Clyde quiere pasar tiempo con sus hermanas; Lincoln escucha a escondidas a sus padres y piensa que han decidido deshacerse de sus hijos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lori le regala a Lincoln una bicicleta rosa de segunda mano, pero como siente vergüenza de que lo ven llevándola, le quita a Lori sin decirle a nada su bicicleta BMX; Lincoln investiga por qué el inodoro está atascado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln derrama uno de los experimentos de Lisa, desencadenando una reacción en cadena en toda la casa; Lincoln trata de animar a la familia a dejar de usar tanta electricidad.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene que cuidar la tarántula de la clase; Lincoln decide ir a la huelga hasta que alguien cambie deberes con él.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln va a su primer concierto de rock junto a Luna, quien está decidida a hacerle pasar un momento inolvidable; cuando Lincoln encuentrra un sobre en el ático cree que se trata de un fajo de billetes oculto por alguien de la casa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln entrena a Lana para que sustituya a Lola en un concurso, ya que Lola está enferma; Lincoln y Clyde creen que será sencillo hacer de niñeros de Lilly, pero no lo es.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene las manos ocupadas cuando sus diez hermanas le piden cubrirlas en el mismo día; Bobby y Lori van en una cita doble con Lincoln y la pequeña hermana de Bobby, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln comienza a pasar mucho tiempo en casa de Clyde, porque el padre de éste le presta más atención que su propio padre; Lincoln se monta en una limosina, y después de haber probado el sabor de la buena vida, su actitud cambia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia de Lincoln forma una banda cuando él se inscribe para un concurso de talentos; la madre de Lincoln le ofrece llevarlo a la oficina dental en la que ella trabaja, mientras que sus hermanas van a trabajar con su padre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes, Luan gasta bromas a toda la casa, pero Lincoln este año tiene un plan para evitar caer en ellas; los hermanos Loud van juntos al supermercado a hacer la compra para su mamá, pero Lincoln tiene un plan alternativo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde tienen que empezar un negocio, como parte de una tarea escolar, así que comienzan a ganar dinero con la experiencia de Lincoln tratando con chicas; los miembros de la familia Loud se venden los unos a los otros en una subasta.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde van de acampada para recuperar su hombría perdida; Lincoln consigue a Lori un empleo en una sala de videojuegos que además es pizzería, pero Lori se mete en problemas cuando Lincoln comienza a pedirle favores.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Aunque su madre le obliga, Lincoln no quiere jugar al fútbol americano, pero él tiene un plan para que Lynn lo sustituya; Licoln se vuelve un hipocondríaco después de que Lucy le augure que su día terminará en un desastre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln accidentalmente le arreglan cuatro citas para el baile Sadie Hawkins en la escuela; cuando Lincoln y Bobby se hacen amigos, Lori se dispone a poner a Bobby celoso pasando el tiempo con Clyde.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln desearía tener diez hermanos en lugar de diez hermanas, pero Lisa le abre los ojos y le enseña cuál es la realidad; Lola quiere formar parte de un club secreto de hermanos, pero sus hermanos no son tan partidarios.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln empieza a acaparar la atención cuando se convierte en asistente de Luan; los ruidosos niños se divierten en un día nevado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln se enamoran de su nuevo profesor particular, por lo que él no puede estudiar; los niños se quejan de su casa, pero cuando un tornado la destruye, cambian de manera de pensar.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde hacen una pasantia donde Flip, obteniendo el título de gerentes; Lincoln, preocupado por lo aburrida que se ha vuelto la vida diaria del abuelo, lo lleva afuera para pasar juntos una jornada memorable.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde le pide consejo a Lincoln sobre cómo ser un buen hermano mayor porque se ha enterado de que sus padres van a tener otro hijo; Lori y Leni han comprado dos vestidos idénticos, lo que origina una discusión tremenda en casa de los Loud.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando los Laud ganan un viaje a un complejo, deciden llevar a sus hijos con ellos porque estos prometieron comportarse; cuando Lucy se enamora de un chico normal y corriente, su hermana decide cambiarle el look.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La posición social de Lincoln está en juego cuando su hermana de 4 años de edad entra en su clase de quinto grado; los niños se cansan de que la camioneta familiar se malogre, por lo que deciden tratar de engañar a papá para que compre una nueva.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lola y Lana quieren ser scouts, pero se dan cuenta de que una está más capacitada que la otra para lograrlo; Lincoln y Clyde creen que Bobby está engañando a Lori, por lo que lo siguen a todos lados para recabar pruebas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Papá se enfada con los niños porque nunca cierran la puerta principal de la vivienda, por lo que decide tomar medidas para asegurar que la vivienda esté protegida; Lincoln borra sin querer sus fotos de infancia y Clyde y él intentan recrearlas.

programme.desc: Tony explores the Ozark culture and its unique and hospitable community.

programme.desc: Tony travels to Cajun country and enjoys a mind-bending boucherie.

programme.desc: In Penang, Tony celebrates Chinese New Year and visits a tea house.

programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain's Japanese trip begins in Osaka at an underground bar.

programme.desc: Tony answers the top 10 viewer questions from an online poll.

programme.desc: Tony cruises Croatia's coast in search of The New Riviera.

programme.desc: Tony discovers the determination necessary to live in modern-day Nicaragua.

programme.desc: In Berlin, Tony finds a city with two distinct personalities.

programme.desc: Tony's travels finally bring him to Rome.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony's in for a wild trip in Uzbekistan's 2000-year-old capital, Tashkent.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony gets to know the food, drink and people of the Hudson River Valley.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony Bourdain is in Washington, DC, to explore this city of contrasts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Despite his initial cynicism, Tony admits to liking Cleveland, Ohio.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony reveals there's more than just kebabs in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Adam is convinced that his wife Tara is cheating on him with a man named Chuck and doubts their child's paternity. Then, Victoria does not know if Josh W or Josh G fathered her baby!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Melody believes her boyfriend Glenn hired Marra to wash cars in a bikini and sleep with him. Glenn suspects Melody hasn't been faithful too. Plus, Dani isn't sure if her boyfriend Robert slept with her sister.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nesi thinks Omar is cheating on her with another man from text messages on his phone. Plus, Karissa's life fell apart after she and her husband moved in with Josh! A few weeks later, their baby mysteriously died. What will the lie detectors say?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Greg tells Kim that he wants to start dating Mandy. Shannon confronts Dominic and friend Brandy for their affair. Plus, Leah wants her girlfriend Mary to choose between her or her ex Richelle!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pimp Hotlanta will set Nika straight about their relationship. Stephanie confronts her pal Erika for having sex with her man. Gloria was crushed when she found out that her sister stole her man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Holiday food fights, proposals, poetry and North Pole dancers, this episode has it all.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today, Vicki will face her husband Jason and his lover with an ultimatum and Anna admits she’s trying to steal Misty’s husband – again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't stand the constant meddling by her boyfriend's ex, Sarah. Next Deborah suspects that her long-time girlfriend has been cheating on her. Later, Angelina was pregnant when her husband had an affair.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael cheated on his wife Alecia with a stripper who may now be pregnant. Sarah confronts a stripper named Amy who she says slept with her man. Missy is here to lay down the laws of the strip club.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jaycee shows Brandy that it’s never ok to cheat and ruin a family. Casi feels her fiancé could learn a lesson from past guest Kevin. Plus, we set viewer Tamara and guest Nathan up on a date.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree's worried about the rumors that her man is sleeping with her sister. But will these sisters really battle for Cruz's love? Will Bryant take back Jalissa after she cheated?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept him for who he is. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his tendencies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Deuce is here to finally come clean to his wife and tell her that he's been sleeping with their friend. Next Debbie is about to find out that her boyfriend, Chris, is more than just friends with his friend Cory!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Je’nier has a wild secret to share with Preston. Then, it’s Nikki and Nikky going after one man! Will Nikki or Nikky win Kevin’s heart? Does Kevin deserve either’s love?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Hope is here to confront her best friend, Laura, for stealing her boyfriend, Joey, and then becoming engaged to him. Next, John will claim he's not to be blamed for sleeping with his girlfriend's best friend!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The look back at the legend of Montblanc Noland and Kalgara the warrior continues with the story of how these two very different men suddenly found friendship – and then lost it just as quickly!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Montblanc Noland and the warrior Kalgara succeed in settling their difference before parting ways, but the laws of nature and man conspire to keep them apart – permanently!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eneru strikes Angel Island with a devastating lightning bolt, and Luffy continues his heroic climb up the giant beanstalk. The rubber-man refuses to stop until he rings the golden bell – no matter what the cost!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Eneru continues his thunderous barrage, Nami hatches a plan to give Luffy one more shot at a grudge match with god. Zoro’s at the center of the scheme, but he might not survive his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s quick thinking gets Luffy closer to god, and the Straw Hat captain launches himself into the center of a sinister storm! Can he find a way to destroy Eneru’s looming cloud of death?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Luffy’s epic battle with Eneru, sunny skies chase away the storms, and the cloud-dwelling citizens of Angel Island turn their attention to rebuilding their homeland.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin attempts to decipher the riddle of a mysterious poneglyph, Usopp barters with the locals, and Luffy raids the priceless treasures of the legendary city of gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their new friends – and a giant octopus – the Straw Hats bid farewell to Skypiea and begin their descent back to the deep blue sea. Where they’ll land is anyone’s guess!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a frightening fall from the clouds, the Straw Hats find themselves trapped inside an impenetrable Marine stronghold. The crew gets separated, the Going Merry is impounded, and rumors of ghosts run rampant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Nami searches for the Going Merry, Luffy and Sanji pose as famous chefs, only to end up competing in a cooking contest with a beautiful mistress of the galley!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is imprisoned and interrogated, and Chopper’s ill-chosen hiding spot lands him in the operating room along with a doctor who can’t stand the sight of blood!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s insatiable appetite betrays his true identity, and yet another member of his crew ends up in the brig when two Straw Hats try to fool Commander Jonathan with the same disguise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Commander Jonathan sets a Straw Hat trap, but Luffy and Sanji are willing to risk it all to help spring their mates. Will a souvenir from the sky save the day – or will their escape plan be scuttled by foul play?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang make a break for the docks, and Commander Jonathan deploys armed guards in an attempt to slow down the Straw Hats. Only one thing is certain: somebody is going down for the count!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are surrounded, outnumbered, blasted with tear gas. Taking a pretty, young doctor hostage may be their only hope for surviving long enough for a Merry reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew were almost in the clear when Nami made a horrifying discovery: the Marines stole their gold! Now, the Straw Hats must sail straight into the thick of the fight to reclaim their lost riches!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!

programme.desc: A lucrative rare orchid business attracts the attention of an ex-convict who tries to swindle himself into a partnership.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: What appears to be homicide in defense of a young woman's honor proves to be an entirely different matter when Perry Mason discovers all lipstick is not kiss-proof.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A young woman, radiantly happy over her forthcoming marriage, and her roommate are found close to death from an overdose of sleeping pills.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: After helping a movie studio head put up bail for a beautiful young hitchhiker arrested for vagrancy, Mason finds himself involved in a case of blackmail and homicide.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A homicide almost a year old, another of more recent vintage caused by arsenic poisoning, and a corpse that disappeared are all figured prominently in this case.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The particular way a candle has burned proves to be a key clue as Mason's client is charged with the murder of her husband.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank visit a local legend in North Carolina. After picking through an accumulation of school busses and a burned-down storage house.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In aptly named Pickens, South Carolina, the guys scour the sprawling inventory of a father-and-son picking duo.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As the guys are winding down their trip through the South, Danielle finds them the mother lode of rare motorbike parts in an old warehouse packed with new vintage Harley stock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Pawn Shop--time to find out whose been naughty, who's been nice, who's dressed as Santa and who pays the price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Rick and the Old Man buy an antique 19th Century wine-maker, Chumlee wants to put it into action. Will he succeed and brew a magnificent "Pawn Shop Pinot"?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick has a chance to buy a 1940 quartermasters spyglass that may be from a WWII ship. Can he discover the ship it came from, or will this deal sink?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Contestants compete with throwing knives and slingshots. Before guns, these were the weapons that defined the skills of a true marksman. In addition to the elimination challenge, another contestant suddenly goes home.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: There are 13 contestants left and a critical skill is put to the test: the split-second judgment that determines whether you hit a friend or foe. Meanwhile, rising tension begins to threaten the strength of the teams.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Antonio recruits Steve to help him trade up to a big rig for an old friend who is down on his luck.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Steve and Antonio welcome a new member to their team, and when they decide to go after a food truck for Steve s wife, Steve is forced to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Using muzzle-loading weapons from the revolutionary era, contestants compete in an old-fashioned frontier face-off. Meanwhile, a heated conflict in one team erupts and plays out in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While in Kansas, the guys comb through a promising farmyard littered with stuff but are frustrated when they find nothing at all to buy. Their luck changes when they meet demolition expert Johnny Walker. His collection is staggering.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are in Missouri, heading towards an inherited old farm with plenty of promise. But then Danielle calls with news about an ultimate prize.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While picking in Missouri, the guys stop in at Sam and Stan's steelyard where the father-son duo takes them on a high-speed golf cart tour of their massive hangar and outbuildings, loaded with heaps of metal and rusty junk.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Thanks to his vast collection of stuffed animals and weird curios, lifelong picker and yard sale aficionado Lester is known by his neighbors as the "spooky collector." Tension builds between Mike and Frank over the value of the animals.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Six weeks ago, three couples met at the altar and married as complete strangers. They were matched by experts, but now it's up to them to decide whether or not to continue their relationships. Will they stay married or opt for a divorce?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The three couples that were married at first sight learn about the importance of trust in their relationships. Will their marriages flourish?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Pawn Stars' "Old Man" Mr. Harrison stops by Count's Kustoms with a job that is as unique and old-fashioned as he is. Later, the guys aren't in love with Roli's new special custom project.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy something they've never bought before--a helicopter! Can Rick convince the Old Man to come along and spin up a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Adam and Caveman Rob head to South Africa to face the giant Bark Scorpion, the tiny Uroplectes Scorpion, and the highly venomous Lion Fish. Big pain comes in small packages, and the effects of marine animals' toxins are truly the next level of pain.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: LIAM HEMSWORTH stars in this gritty action thriller. After a car crash leaves money launderer Moe Diamond with no memory, millions in cash, and dirty cops hunting him down, he must race to survive in New York City's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his family.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is superb as Maverick Mitchell, a young flyer who's out to become the best. And Kelly McGillis plays the instructor who teaches Maverick a few things you can't learn in a classroom.

programme.title: Primal (2019)
programme.desc: A hunter (Nicolas Cage) must fight for his life on a ship when his deadly animals — including a rare white jaguar — are set loose by a dangerous criminal out to kill everyone on board.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is superb as Maverick Mitchell, a young flyer who's out to become the best. And Kelly McGillis plays the instructor who teaches Maverick a few things you can't learn in a classroom.

programme.title: Walking Tall (2004)
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a retired soldier who returns to his hometown only to discover the place he grew up is now overrun with crime, drugs and violence. Enlisting the help of his old pal, Chris gets elected Sheriff and fights to clean up his hometown.

programme.title: Lobster War: The Fight Over The World's Richest Fishing Grounds
programme.desc: Lobster War is an award-winning film about a climate-fueled conflict between the US and Canada over waters both countries have claimed since the end of the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Wild Assassins
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Assassins, we will take a closer look at the animals of the wild that have a weapon that is perhaps more deadly to us than any other in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote finally catches a genetic mutant! When it comes to the blue frog, you'll have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: Pegleg sets off in search of his friend Derek, lost after the forest fire. Meanwhile, the troop encounters an unusually speedy tortoise and Hogarth has a run-in with a flycatcher.

programme.title: Hidden Nature in Guinea Bissau
programme.desc: The archipelago of the Bissagos Islands is a dream destination. A labyrinth of 88 islands have been recognized as a Biosphere Reserve by UNESCO.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew discover a frog with transparent skin! Watch as Coyote introduces us to the 'glass frog.'

programme.title: Wild Window: Bejeweled Fishes
programme.desc: They are painted in dazzling colors and striking patterns, as their swirling movements animate the marine landscapes of the tropical Pacific. As these fish go about their daily lives, foraging and schooling, we are their star-struck admirers.

programme.title: Life In A Tide Pool
programme.desc: Learn how Sea Slugs and Nudibranchs can survive, the amazing adaptations they have, and where to find them in tide pools

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Emily makes a brand new friend. Joseph continues to teach the public about cheetahs, while Chobi continues to baffle the staff and doctors with medical problems.

programme.title: Frick I Love Nature
programme.desc: Ants may be small, and have teeny tiny brains, but that hasn't stopped them from taking over the world! To find out where they get the nerve, Gordie meets up with some scientists, wages ant war and sticks his hand into an ant hill.

programme.title: Bear-Like
programme.desc: Follow a bear-family in its struggle for survival in the harsh wilds of Alaska, witness tense scenes of conflict, and discover the untamed lives of these wild creatures.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Stuck between a herd of elephants charging straight for him and the shark-infested waters on the other side, Cyril has nowhere to hide. He is in the dangerous jungle of Gabon, West Africa, on a mission to catch a fanged predatory fish with a deadly bite.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: We travel through time and space to show what one year — four seasons — looks like for the wildest animals of Canada’s East Coast. In Spring, Great Blue Heron fish in one of Prince Edward Island’s many estuaries.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: This show features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of North America. Find out how Canada Geese can fly over 600 miles in a single day. And how the Beaver is able to build dams stretching over 2,000 ft.

programme.title: Human Prey
programme.desc: What can happen when you meet a bear in the wild? Two Montana hikers are attacked by a mother grizzly intent on protecting her cubs; a young man loses his mother to a hungry, 400-pound black bear; and, two hunters in Alaska are ambushed by a grizzly.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Deep within Australia’s desert vistas is a motley crew vying for supremacy amidst the harsh and desolate desert. The competition for limited resources is fierce and animal residents have developed some ingenious methods of survival.

programme.title: Gods in Shackles
programme.desc: On the dark side of India's festivals, see how elephants are mistreated. Hear an impassioned call to alleviate the suffering of these gentle giants.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy can't let his injry slow him down. He recaps the incident before rolling up his sleeves to carry on hunting the mountain man way.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Forging one's own tools was a valuable skill for the mountain men. Laramy takes hammer to steel as he shows us how he crafts his own gear.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson takes it back to prehistoric times in this dinosaur-centric episode.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson gets pinched by a crab, takes on the 'jellyfish challenge' and saves some lobsters.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson gets pinched by a giant beetle and tests out a gross method to cure ant stings.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote checks out the world's most famous frog, the rarest frog in the world and the only toad in Alaska.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A shark attacks a vacationer, and a firefighter is bitten by a rattlesnake.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man crosses paths with a grizzly, and something unknown strikes a surfer.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy clash over expanding to include alligator wrestling shows.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy are determined to catch an 8-toed alligator.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: A mother gator is determined to fight to the death to protect her young.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Despite an attack on a family member, Marius Els, one of the first ever men to interact closely with a hippo, couldn't give up on the pet he saw as his surrogate son until it was too late.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One woman's secret life with deadly venomous snakes is exposed in shocking circumstances while another woman's obsession with venom leads to several near-fatal accidents. Can her family persuade her to give up her passion?

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Yukon
programme.desc: Like the pioneers who came in search of gold, Bear fights his way across the frozen wastelands of North America's Yukon. He battles to stay afloat in treacherous white water and finds himself deep underground in an abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Oregon
programme.desc: Deep in the Oregon wilderness, Bear takes on Hell's Canyon -- the deepest river canyon in the world. Huge snowdrifts, frozen lakes, burnt-out forests, 150-foot cliffs and the frigid white water rapids of the Snake River stand between him and civilization.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Bear Grylls eats a tarantula for breakfast and shows you how to survive hurricane season in the Dominican Republic.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Turkey
programme.desc: Bear Grylls heads for Turkey; from the freezing mountain tops to the lifeless steppes, Bear battles white water rapids, takes on 100-foot climbs and confronts the locals; poisonous snakes and death stalker scorpions.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And fina

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late-model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league softball team.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess..

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fangs Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: Ease into your most practical dungeon-exploring negligee and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Fangs of the Living Dead! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Hawk The Slayer
programme.desc: If you took a D&D adventure written by an 8th grader and turned it into a movie, you'd wind up with Hawk the Slayer. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Best of RiffTrax: Villains
programme.desc: For this Best of, we wanted to focus on some of the more overlooked villains in our catalogue. Though they may not be iconic, these nefarious scoundrels' deeds are no less evil, their laughter is no less insane, and their ponytails are no less greasy.

programme.title: Feeders
programme.desc: When a poorly rendered UFO lands on Earth, the aliens immediately seek out our best and brightest. The aliens proceed to feed on them by waggling around in short bursts so as not to reveal the hand of the Polonia brother currently shaking the puppet.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Ice Cream Man
programme.desc: The kids in this sleepy town are concerned their ice cream man might be a murderer who puts human parts in his ice cream. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Frankentstein Island
programme.desc: Directed by B-Movie "icon" Jerry Warren, this is a riffing journey you don't want to miss. And so with great trepidation, Mike, Kevin and Bill hop into a hot air balloon and head off into the wild blue yonder to riff Frankenstein Island!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Invasion of the Animal People
programme.desc: What do a furry monster terrorizing Lapland, a wrecked spaceship, John Carradine, and a beautiful skiing star have in common? Very little, as it turns out! Nonetheless, you'll find them all in Invasion of the Animal People!

programme.title: Giant From The Unknown
programme.desc: A sleepy mountain town called Pine Ridge has a big problem: someone's been mutilating their cows. Ah, it must be the giant from the title of the movie, you're probably thinking. Spoiler alert: nope! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill to find out!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Jack-O
programme.desc: What was your favorite Halloween tradition? The candy? Or visiting a middle-aged guy's Haunted Garage? Jack-O strongly posits that the last one was a part of many childhoods. This is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by the guys from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna ends her relationship with Robert, Lexi visits a friend in college, Ashley moves back in with her mom, and Jade begins paying for Sean's treatment.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley asks Bar to stay away from Holly's birthday party, Brianna sets her sights on college, Kayla gets mixed messages from Stephan, and Jade reaches her breaking point.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley reconnects with Bar (despite her family's objections), Brianna tackles her issues in therapy, and Kyler is reluctant to invite his mom to Tobias's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: The girls look back at the biggest moments of what they went through as they were becoming young moms, and dig into fan comments from every step of their journey. Plus, the moms share their favorite unseen moments and reveal sneak peaks.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna and Danae confront each other for the first time since breaking up, Kayla disputes the show's depiction of her relationships, and Lexi and Kyler give a status update.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: After a season full of ups and downs, the cast joins hosts Angela Simmons and psychologist Dr. Joy Bradford to rehash their hardships as well as the successes in their lives.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley gets back on track with school. Kayla realizes she may have to drop out of school to take care of Izaiah. Brianna struggles to balance multiple jobs and childcare. Kiaya is under pressure to make peace with her baby's father.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna reaches out to her ex. Kayla's new boyfriend plans to move out of state. Rachel decides she doesn't want a paternity test. Kiaya worries her girlfriend isn't taking parenthood seriously. Ashley prepares for her family and Bar to meet.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla starts to deal with her second pregnancy. Rachel is due any day but her family is forced to worry about her sister instead. Kiaya questions Teazha's commitment to their relationship. Brianna gets shocking news from an old high school friend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna gets a paternity test for Braeson. Kayla finally tells her mom the news about her pregnancy. Rachel gives birth and makes a decision about the birth certificate. Ashley and Bar try to revive their relationship with a trip to LA.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna gets the results of Braeson's paternity test. Ashley reaches her breaking point with Bar. Kayla tries to give Stephan another chance to be in Izaiah's life. Kiaya starts talking to X'Zayveon again, but his mom is a different story.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kiaya's water breaks in the middle of the night. Ashley leans in to singlehood. Brianna gets a response from Braeson's father. Kayla realizes she's in a lose-lose situation. Rachel is trying to break the cycle.
